name: Classic Chocolate Chip Cookies
description: A timeless recipe for chewy and delicious chocolate chip cookies with a hint of sea salt. A perfect treat for any occasion.
steps: In a medium bowl, whisk together flour, baking soda, and salt.
In a large bowl, beat butter, granulated sugar, and brown sugar with a mixer until creamy.
Beat in eggs one at a time, then stir in vanilla extract.
Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients and mix until just combined.
Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto ungreased baking sheets.
Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until the edges are golden brown.
Let cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring to a wire rack.
